title: [release-1.15] Make imagebuildah.BuildOptions.Architecture/OS optional
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

> /kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

When committing an image, the Architecture and OS fields in the imagebuildah.BuildOptions structure were applied unconditionally, even when they were empty, which would overwrite the usually-non-empty values supplied by the base image.

#### How to verify it

Build an image by calling the imagebuildah API, like OpenShift does.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

Cherry-picked from #2435.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```
None
```

comments.body: @nalind can we also backport this fix to buildah 1.14.z? I know @TomSweeneyRedHat is trying to backport 1.14.10 to OpenShift 4.5. This would help a customer upgrade - the bad arch/OS tags interfere with their image scanning tools.
The 1.14 counterpart for this PR is #2484.
